  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Investment & Funds Mobilization Manager",
  "description": "TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the Financial Services sector, isrecruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Investment &amp; Funds Mobilization Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Investment &amp; Funds Mobilization Manager, you will be responsible for sourcing funds, promoting investment products, and building strong investor relationships to support the company&rsquo;s liquidity and growth objectives.


Responsibilities


	Mobilize funds from individuals and corporate entities to meet the company&rsquo;s liquidity needs
	Identify new markets and develop relationships to expand the investor base
	Promote and sell investment and treasury products to prospective clients
	Manage and maintain relationships with existing investors to ensure retention and growth
	Provide recommendations on investment of excess liquidity and ensure portfolio diversification


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Finance, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in financial services with focus on treasury, investment, or funds mobilization
	Proven track record in selling financial products and managing corporate and individual client relationships
	Professional certification such as CIS, CFA, or relevant financial certification is an advantage
	Strong communication, negotiation, and client acquisition skills.


Salary
N500,000 - N800,000 / Month.&nbsp;",

Investment & Funds Mobilization Manager Job at TeamAce Limited




        
    

        
        TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the Financial Services sector, isrecruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Investment & Funds Mobilization Manager

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Investment & Funds Mobilization Manager, you will be responsible for sourcing funds, promoting investment products, and building strong investor relationships to support the company’s liquidity and growth objectives.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Mobilize funds from individuals and corporate entities to meet the company’s liquidity needs
	Identify new markets and develop relationships to expand the investor base
	Promote and sell investment and treasury products to prospective clients
	Manage and maintain relationships with existing investors to ensure retention and growth
	Provide recommendations on investment of excess liquidity and ensure portfolio diversification


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Finance, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in financial services with focus on treasury, investment, or funds mobilization
	Proven track record in selling financial products and managing corporate and individual client relationships
	Professional certification such as CIS, CFA, or relevant financial certification is an advantage
	Strong communication, negotiation, and client acquisition skills.


Salary
N500,000 - N800,000 / Month.     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Full-Stack Developer",
  "description": "The Nigerian Capital Development Fund (NCDF) Group Plc is an impact investor focused on emerging markets. The NCDFGroup acts as a strategic umbrella for a diverse range of emerging ventures, encompassing Financial Technology, Affordable Green Housing &amp; Renewable Energy, Entertainment &amp; Media and Training &amp; Mobility sectors. Our aim is to establish financially viable businesses that solve social and environmental problems.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Full-Stack Developer
Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo

About the job


	We are seeking an exceptional Full-Stack Developer with strong expertise in Flutter, React, backend development, and DevOps to help us build and scale high-quality digital products.
	This role is for a technically strong builder who can move confidently from product interface to backend logic to deployment infrastructure.
	You will play a key role in developing robust applications, improving system performance, and supporting a modern, scalable engineering environment.


What you&rsquo;ll do


	Build and maintain mobile applications using Flutter
	Develop modern web interfaces using React
	Design and manage backend services, APIs, and database integrations
	Own or support DevOps workflows, including cloud deployment, CI/CD, server environments, and system reliability
	Work closely with internal stakeholders to translate ideas into production-ready solutions


What we&rsquo;re looking for


	Proven experience as a Full-Stack Developer
	Deep hands-on knowledge of Flutter and React
	Strong backend development capability
	Good working knowledge of DevOps, cloud infrastructure, deployment pipelines, and system administration environments
	Ability to build secure, scalable, and maintainable applications
	Strong problem-solving ability and a delivery-focused mindset


Method of Application

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;career@ncdfgroup.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Full-Stack Developer Job at the Nigerian Capital Development Fund (NCDF) Group




        
    

        
        The Nigerian Capital Development Fund (NCDF) Group Plc is an impact investor focused on emerging markets. The NCDFGroup acts as a strategic umbrella for a diverse range of emerging ventures, encompassing Financial Technology, Affordable Green Housing & Renewable Energy, Entertainment & Media and Training & Mobility sectors. Our aim is to establish financially viable businesses that solve social and environmental problems.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Full-Stack Developer
Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo

About the job
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an exceptional Full-Stack Developer with strong expertise in Flutter, React, backend development, and DevOps to help us build and scale high-quality digital products.
	This role is for a technically strong builder who can move confidently from product interface to backend logic to deployment infrastructure.
	You will play a key role in developing robust applications, improving system performance, and supporting a modern, scalable engineering environment.


What you’ll do


	Build and maintain mobile applications using Flutter
	Develop modern web interfaces using React
	Design and manage backend services, APIs, and database integrations
	Own or support DevOps workflows, including cloud deployment, CI/CD, server environments, and system reliability
	Work closely with internal stakeholders to translate ideas into production-ready solutions


What we’re looking for


	Proven experience as a Full-Stack Developer
	Deep hands-on knowledge of Flutter and React
	Strong backend development capability
	Good working knowledge of DevOps, cloud infrastructure, deployment pipelines, and system administration environments
	Ability to build secure, scalable, and maintainable applications
	Strong problem-solving ability and a delivery-focused mindset


Method of Application

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing / Business Development Executive",
  "description": "Property Vision Leadgate Development Limited&nbsp;is a Fast paced real Estate company located in the Capital City of Enugu.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing /&nbsp;Business Development Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Trans-Ekulu, Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities


	Develop and implement effective marketing strategies to promote company properties and services
	Identify and pursue new business opportunities
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients and partners
	Manage digital marketing campaigns (social media, email marketing, etc.)
	Conduct market research to identify trends and opportunities
	Organize and participate in property exhibitions and promotional events
	Prepare marketing materials and presentations.


Requirements

Marketing / Business Development Executive Job at Property Vision Leadgate Development Limited




        
    

        
        Property Vision Leadgate Development Limited is a Fast paced real Estate company located in the Capital City of Enugu.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing / Business Development Executive

Job Location: Trans-Ekulu, Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and implement effective marketing strategies to promote company properties and services
	Identify and pursue new business opportunities
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients and partners
	Manage digital marketing campaigns (social media, email marketing, etc.)
	Conduct market research to identify trends and opportunities
	Organize and participate in property exhibitions and promotional events
	Prepare marketing materials and presentations.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or related field
	Proven experience in marketing, preferably in real estate
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Proficiency in digital marketing tools and social media platforms
	Ability to work independently and meet targets
	Good knowledge of the local real estate market is an added advantage.


Remuneration
Attractive salary with commissions on every successful sale.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Marketing Business Development Executive" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",

  "title": "Lab Manager / Technician",
  "description": "Zeconia GIL is an indigenous, fully integrated oil and gas services company dedicated to advancing Africa&rsquo;s energy landscape through innovation, sustainability, and operational excellence. We deliver end-to-end solutions spanningengineering, procurement, installation, commissioning, marine support, and production optimization, ensuring our clients achieve maximum value and long-term operational reliability.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Lab Manager / Technician

Job Location:&nbsp;Rivers

Key Responsibilities


	Manage daily laboratory operations, including scheduling, testing, and reporting.
	Ensure accurate analysis of samples (e.g., crude oil, drilling fluids, water, chemicals).
	Implement and maintain quality control and quality assurance (QA/QC) systems.
	Ensure compliance with industry standards and regulatory requirements (e.g., ISO, API).
	Supervise and develop laboratory staff, including training and performance management.
	Review and approve laboratory test results and reports.
	Maintain laboratory equipment, ensuring calibration and proper functionality.
	Manage inventory of chemicals, reagents, and consumables.
	Enforce strict HSE policies and safe laboratory practices.
	Support audits, inspections, and continuous improvement initiatives.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, or related field.
	5&ndash;10+ years of aboratory experience in oil &amp; gas, petrochemical, or industrial environment.
	Strong knowledge of laboratory testing methods (e.g., ASTM, API standards).
	Experience with QA/QC systems and laboratory accreditation (e.g., ISO 17025 preferred).
	Familiarity with oil &amp; gas laboratory analysis (crude assay, fluid testing, water analysis).


Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@zeconia.com&nbsp;using &quot;Lab Manager/Techncian&quot; as the subject of the mail.
Or
Click here to apply online",

Lab Manager / Technician Job at Zeconia GIL




        
    

        
        Zeconia GIL is an indigenous, fully integrated oil and gas services company dedicated to advancing Africa’s energy landscape through innovation, sustainability, and operational excellence. We deliver end-to-end solutions spanningengineering, procurement, installation, commissioning, marine support, and production optimization, ensuring our clients achieve maximum value and long-term operational reliability.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Lab Manager / Technician

Job Location: Rivers

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage daily laboratory operations, including scheduling, testing, and reporting.
	Ensure accurate analysis of samples (e.g., crude oil, drilling fluids, water, chemicals).
	Implement and maintain quality control and quality assurance (QA/QC) systems.
	Ensure compliance with industry standards and regulatory requirements (e.g., ISO, API).
	Supervise and develop laboratory staff, including training and performance management.
	Review and approve laboratory test results and reports.
	Maintain laboratory equipment, ensuring calibration and proper functionality.
	Manage inventory of chemicals, reagents, and consumables.
	Enforce strict HSE policies and safe laboratory practices.
	Support audits, inspections, and continuous improvement initiatives.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, or related field.
	5–10+ years of aboratory experience in oil & gas, petrochemical, or industrial environment.
	Strong knowledge of laboratory testing methods (e.g., ASTM, API standards).
	Experience with QA/QC systems and laboratory accreditation (e.g., ISO 17025 preferred).
	Familiarity with oil & gas laboratory analysis (crude assay, fluid testing, water analysis).


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Lab Manager/Techncian" as the subject of the mail.
Or
Click here to apply online    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Insurance Customer Services Personnel",
  "description": "Elite Logistics &amp; Development Services Limited is an indigenous company with its operating office in Lagos and duly registered under the companies and allied matters ACT 1990 with RC1195367. ELADS Limited prides itself in meeting modern-day civil engineering, construction and general contracts administration challenges and ensuring timely, successful completion of projects.

Elite Logistics &amp; Development Services Limited strives to conduct its business fairly and honestly with consideration to the long-term needs of all its stakeholders. Competitive tendering, professional management, quality construction, an excellent safety record, a proven ability, cooperative and proactive approach have ensured our delivery of highest quality workman Poship and client satisfaction in both the public and private sectors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Insurance Customer &nbsp;Services Personnel

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Brief


	We are seeking a highly motivated and competitive Insurance Sales Representative to join our team and drive the expansion of our business.
	Your primary responsibility will be to proactively seek out and acquire new clients, understanding their specific insurance needs and offering tailored solutions.
	By building strong relationships, your aim will be to facilitate business growth and enhance our firm&rsquo;s reputation in the market.
	As an Insurance Sales Representative, you will play a crucial role in promoting our insurance products and services.
	This will involve engaging with potential clients, showcasing the benefits of our offerings, and effectively closing sales. Additionally, you will actively contribute to our marketing efforts and stay updated on industry trends to provide informed recommendations to clients.
	Ultimately, your dedication and results-driven approach will contribute to the overall success and growth of our firm.


Responsibilities


	Design and implement effective marketing strategies to sell new insurance contracts or adjust existing ones
	Contact potential clients and create rapport by networking, cold calling, using referrals etc
	Appraise the wishes and demands of business or individual customers and sell the suitable protection plans
	Collect information from clients on their risk profiles in order to offer them the proper solution
	Prepare reports to shareholders on the success of your business endeavors
	Retain continuous awareness of transactions, sales and terms and keep relative records
	Check insurance claims to solidify trust and safeguard reputation
	Frequently replenish job-specific knowledge and apply it on the field
	Fulfill all company-established policy obligations


Requirements and skills


	High school or BSc degree
	Proven experience as an Insurance Sales Representative
	Good comprehension of insurance plans including automobile, fire, life, property, medical etc.
	Ability to work with computers and understand and interpret standard statistical findings
	Goal-oriented
	Excellent skills in communication and presentation
	Experience in delivering client-focused solutions and in creating long-lasting relationships


&nbsp;Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send&nbsp;their CV To:&nbsp;elitelogisticdevelopment@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Insurance Customer Services Personnel Job at Elite Logistics & Development Services Limited




        
    

        
        Elite Logistics & Development Services Limited is an indigenous company with its operating office in Lagos and duly registered under the companies and allied matters ACT 1990 with RC1195367. ELADS Limited prides itself in meeting modern-day civil engineering, construction and general contracts administration challenges and ensuring timely, successful completion of projects.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Elite Logistics & Development Services Limited strives to conduct its business fairly and honestly with consideration to the long-term needs of all its stakeholders. Competitive tendering, professional management, quality construction, an excellent safety record, a proven ability, cooperative and proactive approach have ensured our delivery of highest quality workman Poship and client satisfaction in both the public and private sectors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Insurance Customer  Services Personnel

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Brief


	We are seeking a highly motivated and competitive Insurance Sales Representative to join our team and drive the expansion of our business.
	Your primary responsibility will be to proactively seek out and acquire new clients, understanding their specific insurance needs and offering tailored solutions.
	By building strong relationships, your aim will be to facilitate business growth and enhance our firm’s reputation in the market.
	As an Insurance Sales Representative, you will play a crucial role in promoting our insurance products and services.
	This will involve engaging with potential clients, showcasing the benefits of our offerings, and effectively closing sales. Additionally, you will actively contribute to our marketing efforts and stay updated on industry trends to provide informed recommendations to clients.
	Ultimately, your dedication and results-driven approach will contribute to the overall success and growth of our firm.


Responsibilities


	Design and implement effective marketing strategies to sell new insurance contracts or adjust existing ones
	Contact potential clients and create rapport by networking, cold calling, using referrals etc
	Appraise the wishes and demands of business or individual customers and sell the suitable protection plans
	Collect information from clients on their risk profiles in order to offer them the proper solution
	Prepare reports to shareholders on the success of your business endeavors
	Retain continuous awareness of transactions, sales and terms and keep relative records
	Check insurance claims to solidify trust and safeguard reputation
	Frequently replenish job-specific knowledge and apply it on the field
	Fulfill all company-established policy obligations


Requirements and skills


	High school or BSc degree
	Proven experience as an Insurance Sales Representative
	Good comprehension of insurance plans including automobile, fire, life, property, medical etc.
	Ability to work with computers and understand and interpret standard statistical findings
	Goal-oriented
	Excellent skills in communication and presentation
	Experience in delivering client-focused solutions and in creating long-lasting relationships


 Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV To: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
